sections.heading: Lead
sections.content:
a poster for the film

Diāochán (貂蟬) is a soundfilm released in 1938. It was directed by Bu Wancang and produced by the Xinhua Film Company. Diaochan is played by Gu Lanjun 顧蘭君. The film is also known under the literal translation of 'Diaochan'; sable cicada.

When the reigning Chinese Han dynasty is threatened by the designing warlord Dong Zhuo, the beautiful Diaochan is sent forth from her sequestered life in her home to act upon her foster father Wang Yun's advice. Using her beauty Diaochan causes friction between Dong Zhuo and his mighty general Lü Bu.

sections.heading: Plot summary
sections.content: When the reigning Chinese Han dynasty is threatened by the designing warlord Dong Zhuo, the beautiful Diaochan is sent forth from her sequestered life in her home to act upon her foster father Wang Yun's advice. Using her beauty Diaochan causes friction between Dong Zhuo and his mighty general Lü Bu.

sections.heading: Cast
sections.content:
- Gu Lanjun as Diaochan (credited as Violet Koo)

- Jin Shan as Lü Bu

- Gu Eryi as Dong Zhuo

- Wei Heling as Wang Yun

- Tang Jie as Li Jue
